_readme: Map each lesson to a video or audio URL so citations can seek directly to the timestamp. Key format is "<module>::<lesson>" using the SAME cleaned names the ingest script produces (see scripts/ingest.ts's cleanLessonName). Run `npm run ingest -- --list-lessons` or check a source card's tooltip in the UI to find exact keys. Values can be direct .mp4/.webm/.m4a URLs, or a YouTube/Vimeo embed URL — the player component auto-detects which.
